microsoft_ft: Owned **end-to-end deployment** of Azure's resilience validation program, embedding with enterprise partners (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp) to scope, build, and ship integrations that drove **$14M+ business impact**.

Built a 0→1 internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining self-service scheduling requirements and translating field learnings into reusable platform features that cut operational toil by **30%**.

Shipped Azure's first rack-level proactive testing capability in 4 months — scoped requirements directly with customers, deployed the solution, and achieved a **94% recovery rate** across all partner engagements.
Served as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation deployment tied to a **$1.5B+ contract**, coordinating 14 cross-org execution runs under executive visibility with zero missed SLAs.
Deployed an internal **AI coding agent** and restructured planning workflows autonomously, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and expanding drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.
microsoft_2023: Drove **adoption of AI-driven code generation** tooling across 14 Azure service teams by running discovery calls, live demos, and hands-on training — saving 37 engineering hours monthly and surfacing gaps fed back into the product roadmap.

Conducted **11+ structured customer interviews** with Azure engineering teams to identify integration pain points, translating vague requests into a concrete intent-based YAML generation feature shipped in the next planning cycle.

Improved data retrieval for internal users by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** system with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% and reducing one-off support requests.
microsoft_2022: Secured cross-functional alignment across 140+ teams on a unified automation prioritization framework, **accelerating region launches by 28%** and generating $3M in faster-recognized revenue.

Ran discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual toil per region launch**, then built and shipped a roadmap to automate critical paths — turning field learnings directly into platform improvements.
Built a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership the real-time signal needed to target automation gaps and close the highest-impact support tickets first.
amazon_robotics: Defined the **legacy OS migration strategy** for a 2,000+ unit pilot fleet, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and coordinating IT, Operations, and Engineering to achieve zero operational downtime.

Implemented **automated CI/CD pipelines** in partnership with cross-functional engineering teams, cutting the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual release toil for the core robotics platform.
Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, resolving **40+ high-priority backlog tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and keep the migration shipping on schedule.
pro_painters: Deployed a **new CRM integration** and owned the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, increasing job bookings by 26% through tighter workflow execution and faster customer turnaround.

Cut **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing the website, Google Business profile, and paid acquisition funnel.
Conducted profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks, delivering pricing model improvements that directly informed leadership's go-forward rate card strategy.

tailoring_notes: 'end-to-end deployment' and 'field learnings into platform features' from the JD's 'own implementations end to end' and 'translate field learnings into product' — woven into microsoft_ft bullets 1 and 2.
'AI coding agent' and 'autonomously' mirror the JD's 'running AI coding agents autonomously, including overnight' — microsoft_ft bullet 5.
'discovery calls' and 'translating vague requests into a concrete feature' mirror the JD's 'run a discovery call...turn vague pain points into a shipping plan' — microsoft_2023 bullet 1 and 2.
'third-party API integrations' and 'CRM integration' mirror the JD's 'third-party integrations, vendors' and PMS integration focus — amazon_robotics and pro_painters.
'go-to-market' and 'customer turnaround' in pro_painters mirrors the JD's 'partner with sales and customer success to close strategic deals' framing.
